title: Can a factory fresh soulless EVA do anything
display_title: Can a factory fresh soulless EVA do anything
wikitext:
[]: Can a factory-fresh (soulless) EVA do anything             Quote Post by hwdge » Thu Dec 13, 2012 1:22 am Since evas are giant humans, this means they have brains and hormones and everything that comes with the starter package right? If an eva had no soul , could it perform basic body functions(if they even need to) or respond to external stimulus?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Dec 13, 2012 1:42 am About as living as our friends on display at the Rei-quarium. Likewise, referring to them as "basic body functions" is awfully vague, considering the bodies are composed of the magical Particle Wave Matter which defies physics in the first place. Not much is known about what goes on in the bodies of our regular, soul-equipped Evas, let alone how that might be different with a soulless Eva, if at all. I'd imagine they're the same lifeless dummies they're supposed to be when they're not being actively used, only difference being that a soulless one won't react when you try to use it. :P
